concept: Narrate / To Give a Path to a Story
description: The act of telling a story, especially in a detailed and structured way. It is the process of guiding a listener along the path of a narrative.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'tho' (a whole system), 'ma' (grounded presence), and the now-deprecated 'la'. The word's structure suggests 'to ground a whole system on a path.' It is recommended to re-word this concept using 'loa' in the future.
